en.title: Best Gaming Monitors 2026
en.description: Ranked by performance and value, from the first 4K OLED with true uncompressed output to the budget Mini LED that redefined what $250 can buy.

zh-tw.title: 最佳電競螢幕 2026
zh-tw.description: 2026 年電競螢幕完整排行，從全球首款 4K OLED 零壓縮輸出到改寫預算螢幕標準的 Mini LED，幫你找到最值得買的那塊螢幕。

en.description: The only 27" 4K 240Hz QD-OLED with DisplayPort 2.1a UHBR20, delivering fully uncompressed 4K at 240Hz with 10-bit HDR.

zh-tw.description: 全球唯一搭載 DP 2.1a UHBR20 的 27 吋 4K 240Hz QD-OLED，4K 240Hz 加 10-bit HDR 完全零壓縮輸出。

en.description: A 27" 1440p Tandem OLED running at 540Hz with under 0.1ms GTG response time, the highest-performing competitive gaming display of 2026.

zh-tw.description: 27 吋 1440p Tandem OLED 面板，540Hz 刷新率搭配低於 0.1ms GTG 反應時間，2026 年競技電競螢幕的性能天花板。

en.description: A 32" 4K 240Hz QD-OLED with built-in Smart TV gaming hub and AI upscaling, the definitive large-format OLED gaming monitor.

zh-tw.description: 32 吋 4K 240Hz QD-OLED，內建 Smart TV Gaming Hub 和 AI 升頻，大尺寸 OLED 電競螢幕的最強選項。

en.description: A 27" 1440p WOLED at 480Hz combining OLED image fidelity with near-competitive-grade refresh rate and factory-calibrated accuracy.

zh-tw.description: 27 吋 1440p WOLED，480Hz 刷新率加上出廠精確校色，畫質和競技速度的高端平衡點。

en.description: A 27" 1440p 360Hz QD-OLED with a 3-year burn-in warranty and anti-reflective coating, the most practical OLED for combined gaming and work use.

zh-tw.description: 27 吋 1440p 360Hz QD-OLED，附三年燒屏換新保固和抗反射鍍膜，工作和遊戲都要顧的人最務實的 OLED 選擇。

en.description: A 27" 4K 280Hz QD-OLED with Dolby Vision and G-SYNC at $799, the most accessible entry point into 4K OLED gaming.

zh-tw.description: 27 吋 4K 280Hz QD-OLED，內建 Dolby Vision 和 G-SYNC，NT$25,900 是 4K OLED 電競螢幕目前最低的入場門檻。

en.description: A 27" 1440p 165Hz Mini LED with 576-zone local dimming at $250, delivering measured HDR contrast above 10,000:1 at a price that retired the flat IPS budget category.

zh-tw.description: 27 吋 1440p 165Hz Mini LED，576 分區局部調光，暗場 HDR 對比度實測超過 10,000:1，NT$8,500 左右把預算螢幕的標準往上提了整整一個等級。

en.description: A 24" 1080p 540Hz Esports-TN monitor with NVIDIA Reflex Analyzer and ULMB 2, engineered specifically for professional FPS competition.

zh-tw.description: 24 吋 1080p 540Hz E-TN 電競螢幕，內建 NVIDIA Reflex Analyzer 和 ULMB 2，針對職業 FPS 選手的競技工具，畫質讓步給純粹的速度。

en.description: The first 34-inch 360Hz Gen 5 QD-OLED monitor, introducing an RGB stripe subpixel layout that eliminates previous-generation text clarity issues while delivering 1,300-nit peak brightness.

zh-tw.description: 第一款第五代 QD-OLED 面板的 34 吋 360Hz 曲面超寬螢幕，RGB 條紋子像素排列徹底解決前幾代 QD-OLED 的文字渲染問題，峰值亮度 1,300 尼特。

references.title: Best Gaming Monitors 2026: Budget, Curved, G-Sync and More
The 6 Best Gaming Monitors of 2026
Best gaming monitors 2026: 4K, HDR, best overall, budget, and more
The Best OLED Gaming Monitors to Buy in 2026
Best gaming monitors in 2026: Top picks for PC, PS5 and Xbox

en.commentary:
The 2026 gaming monitor market crossed a definitive threshold: OLED is no longer a premium specification, it is the category standard. QD-OLED search volume has nearly tripled over the past 12 months, and the question consumers bring to buying guides has changed from "is OLED worth it?" to "which OLED should I buy?" That shift is the clearest signal that a technology has matured into a default recommendation.

The ASUS ROG Swift OLED PG27UCDM earns the top ranking for one specific reason: bandwidth. At 4K 240Hz with 10-bit HDR, DisplayPort 2.1a UHBR20 delivers 80 Gbps, the only interface capable of fully uncompressed output at that specification. Every other 4K OLED gaming monitor on the market uses DSC compression at peak settings. ASUS solved that problem first. TFTCentral and RTINGS confirmed the panel performance advantage in their testing, and eliminating compression on the signal chain is the defining engineering achievement of this monitor generation.

The LG UltraGear 27GX790B-B at 540Hz holds second place because competitive FPS gaming has a ceiling and this monitor reaches it. OLED response times at 540Hz are categorically faster than LCD motion clarity at the same refresh rate, and Tom's Hardware testing confirmed the moving-target sharpness advantage in live CS2 testing. At $999, the LG is a direct competitive investment.

For most buyers, the Dell Alienware AW2725Q at $799 is the correct entry point into 4K OLED gaming. The same QD-OLED panel generation as monitors costing $300 more, with Dolby Vision and G-SYNC included. The AW2725DF at $830 is the 1440p companion with 360Hz and a three-year burn-in warranty for buyers who prioritize refresh rate and coverage over resolution.

The AOC Q27G3XMN at $250 is the budget recommendation with no caveats. Its 576-zone Mini LED delivers measured contrast performance above 10,000:1 in dark scene testing, a specification that required a $600 monitor 18 months ago. For first-time gaming display buyers or secondary monitor configurations, there is no competing argument for a standard IPS panel at this price.

highlights.title: The PG27UCDM Is the First Monitor to Solve 4K OLED Bandwidth
highlights.body: The bandwidth constraint for 4K 240Hz OLED has always been the limiting factor. Without DisplayPort 2.1a UHBR20, every 4K 240Hz monitor uses DSC compression on at least one signal path, particularly at 10-bit HDR. ASUS eliminated that constraint with the PG27UCDM. At 4K 240Hz 10-bit HDR, the monitor outputs every pixel with zero compression. TFTCentral and RTINGS confirmed the panel analysis advantage, and the difference is measurable in HDR highlight accuracy and fine-text sharpness. When bandwidth is removed as a variable, the fourth-generation ROG QD-OLED panel competes on image quality alone, and it wins on that metric.

highlights.title: 540Hz OLED Is the Competitive Ceiling and the LG 27GX790B-B Reaches It
highlights.body: For competitive FPS gaming, the advantage of higher refresh rates on LCD panels reaches a perceptual ceiling before 540Hz. OLED changes that calculation. The LG 27GX790B-B delivers 540Hz with OLED response times under 0.1ms GTG, a combination that produces motion clarity that TN panels at the same refresh rate cannot match. Tom's Hardware testing confirmed sharper moving targets in CS2 testing at this specification. For Valorant and CS2 players investing at the $999 level, the LG 27GX790B-B represents the full extent of what gaming monitor technology delivers in 2026.

highlights.title: The Alienware AW2725Q at $799 Is the Right Entry Point for 4K OLED
highlights.body: Six months ago, 4K OLED gaming required spending $1,200 or more. The Alienware AW2725Q changed that calculation. At $799, it uses the same QD-OLED panel generation as monitors originally retailing for $300 more, adds Dolby Vision support that most competitors skip at this price, and ships with G-SYNC compatibility. The AW2725DF at $830 is the 1440p sibling offering 360Hz and a three-year burn-in warranty. The choice between the two comes down to one question: resolution priority or refresh rate priority. Both are correct answers.

highlights.title: Dell's Three-Year Burn-In Warranty Makes the AW2725DF the Safest OLED Investment
highlights.body: The primary concern about buying an OLED monitor for desktop use is static-element burn-in from game HUDs, minimaps, and taskbars. Dell addresses this contractually with a three-year burn-in warranty on the AW2725DF, the strongest written coverage in the gaming monitor category. Samsung and LG implement pixel shifting and OLED Safeguard+ respectively, but neither provides a documented exchange commitment. For buyers who cannot accept burn-in risk in their usage scenario, the AW2725DF at $830 with 360Hz QD-OLED plus that warranty represents the most defensible purchase in this generation.

highlights.title: The AOC Q27G3XMN Retired the Case for Standard IPS at $250
highlights.body: The Q27G3XMN costs $250 and includes 576-zone Mini LED local dimming. That specification combination did not exist at twice the price 18 months ago. Dark scene contrast testing measures above 10,000:1, the 165Hz refresh rate covers every current-generation game at 1440p, and the local dimming zone count is high enough to avoid significant blooming in practical use. For builders who need a secondary monitor, a home office primary display, or a first genuine gaming screen, the Q27G3XMN removes every justification for purchasing a standard flat IPS panel in this price range.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年的電競螢幕市場有個很清楚的分水嶺，OLED 現在不是頂配，是基本答案。QD-OLED 螢幕的全球搜尋量在過去 12 個月翻了近三倍，消費者問的問題也從「OLED 值不值得買」變成「要買哪款 OLED」，這個轉變代表技術進入了主流期。

ASUS ROG Swift OLED PG27UCDM 排第一的理由只有一個：頻寬。4K 240Hz 加 10-bit HDR 的訊號量超過 DP 1.4 和 HDMI 2.1 的承載上限，市面上其他 4K OLED 螢幕在這個規格下都需要用 DSC 壓縮。PG27UCDM 的 DP 2.1a UHBR20 帶寬達到 80 Gbps，不需要壓縮，TFTCentral 和 RTINGS 的面板實測都確認了這個差異。訊號鏈零壓縮，就是這個世代最重要的工程成就，所以它排第一。

LG 27GX790B-B 的 540Hz 放在第二名，是因為競技 FPS 玩家的需求有個具體天花板，而這台達到了。OLED 面板在 540Hz 的動態清晰度遠超 LCD，Tom's Hardware 在 CS2 實測中確認移動目標的銳利度領先同頻率的 TN LCD。花約一萬台幣預算的電競玩家，540Hz OLED 就是 2026 年能買到的最高規格，這筆錢值。

大多數買家最正確的 4K OLED 入場選擇是 Dell Alienware AW2725Q，約 NT$25,900，同世代 QD-OLED 面板加 Dolby Vision 和 G-SYNC，同等面板的競品要多花不少錢。想要刷新率優先的玩家可以考慮 AW2725DF，1440p 360Hz 加三年燒屏保固，這個保固覆蓋是 OLED 螢幕裡最紮實的。

預算在一萬以內的話，AOC Q27G3XMN 是 2026 年沒有理由忽略的選擇。576 分區 Mini LED 局部調光，暗場 HDR 對比度測試超過 10,000:1，這個效果一年半前要花接近兩萬才能買到，現在 NT$8,500 左右就有了。首購電競螢幕或是需要第二台螢幕的玩家，這個價位沒有比它更對的答案。

highlights.title: PG27UCDM 排第一的核心理由：4K 240Hz 零壓縮輸出，目前只有它做到
highlights.body: 說清楚這件事很重要。4K 240Hz 加 10-bit HDR 的訊號量，現有的 DP 1.4 和 HDMI 2.1 都不夠用，市面上其他 4K OLED 螢幕在這個規格下全部需要 DSC 壓縮來把訊號塞進去。ASUS 的 DP 2.1a UHBR20 帶寬夠，所以 PG27UCDM 不需要壓縮。TFTCentral 的實測確認了這個差異，在 HDR 高頻細節和文字邊緣的銳利度上壓縮和不壓縮確實有差。這台螢幕的意義，是它為下一代 4K OLED 設定了正確的起點。

highlights.title: 540Hz OLED 不是噱頭，LG 27GX790B 讓這句話真正成立
highlights.body: 540Hz 在 LCD 上的邊際效益已經接近感知極限，但 OLED 的情況不一樣。OLED 的像素反應速度本來就快，540Hz 加上低於 0.1ms 的 GTG 反應時間，動態清晰度是 540Hz TN LCD 做不到的。Tom's Hardware 在 CS2 實測中確認，LG 27GX790B 的移動目標銳利度領先同頻率的 TN 競品。打 Valorant 或 CS2 的玩家如果認真考慮在螢幕上投資，540Hz OLED 是 2026 年的競技天花板，這筆錢花得值。

highlights.title: Dell AW2725DF 的三年燒屏保固，是 OLED 螢幕最有價值的一張保單
highlights.body: 買 OLED 螢幕最常見的顧慮就是靜態元素燒屏，遊戲介面的血條、地圖、工具列都是高風險區域。Dell 直接給 AW2725DF 附上三年燒屏換新保固，是同品類裡最強的書面保障，Samsung 和 LG 有像素位移和保護機制，但都沒有白紙黑字的換新承諾。$830 美元，約 NT$26,900，360Hz QD-OLED 加三年燒屏保固，對不想賭的玩家來說，AW2725DF 是最正確的 OLED 入場選擇。

highlights.title: AW2725Q 打破了 4K OLED 的入場價格門檻
highlights.body: 半年前 4K OLED 電競螢幕的入場費是一萬五以上。Dell Alienware AW2725Q 改變了這個計算，$799 美元約 NT$25,900，同世代 QD-OLED 面板加 Dolby Vision 和 G-SYNC，比同等面板的競品便宜一大截。它旁邊的 AW2725DF 是 1440p 360Hz 版本，多了三年燒屏保固，兩台都是對的選擇，差別只在你優先要解析度還是刷新率。

highlights.title: AOC Q27G3XMN 讓 NT$8,500 的螢幕沒有資格再叫做「將就」
highlights.body: 576 分區 Mini LED 局部調光在一年半前要花接近 NT$18,000 以上，現在 Q27G3XMN 只要 NT$8,500 左右。暗場 HDR 對比度測試超過 10,000:1，165Hz 覆蓋 1440p 的所有現行遊戲，這個規格組合在同價位完全沒有競爭對手。第一次認真買電競螢幕，或是需要第二台螢幕的玩家，NT$8,500 可以買到這塊，再往下選平面 IPS 已經沒有說服力。

references.title: Best OLED Gaming Monitors to Buy in 2026
Best OLED Gaming Monitors 2026
All the new OLED monitors launching in 2026
OLED Monitors in 2026: Current Market Status
The 4 Best OLED Monitors of 2026

en.commentary: ASUS ROG Swift OLED PG27UCDM holds the top position in April 2026, combining 4K resolution with 240Hz on a QD-OLED panel in the 27-inch form factor that most competitive players prefer. The combination of 4K and 240Hz on OLED at this size remains the most complete high-performance monitor package available. LG UltraGear 27GX790B earns second for pure frame rate priority players — 480Hz on a 1440p panel with OLED image quality is the highest refresh rate available in the segment, and the benefit for fast-paced competitive titles is real. Samsung Odyssey OLED G8 rounds out the top three with the best color coverage in the group, at 99% DCI-P3, making it the strongest all-purpose OLED for gaming and content creation.

highlights.title: PG27UCDM 4K/240Hz OLED Is the Complete Package
highlights.body: 4K at 240Hz on a QD-OLED panel with G-Sync Ultimate certification and sub-0.03ms response is the highest specification combination available in a 27-inch gaming monitor. For players who want maximum resolution and maximum refresh rate simultaneously, this is the answer.

highlights.title: LG 27GX790B Leads on Pure Refresh Rate
highlights.body: 480Hz on OLED delivers frame-rate advantage in fast-paced titles that 240Hz monitors cannot match. The 1440p resolution at 27 inches remains sharp enough for competitive play, and the motion clarity advantage over 240Hz panels is visible in side-by-side testing.

highlights.title: Samsung Odyssey OLED G8 Covers Gaming and Content Creation
highlights.body: 99% DCI-P3 color coverage with factory calibration makes the G8 the strongest dual-purpose OLED in this group. Creators who also game benefit from accurate color reproduction that pure gaming monitors sacrifice for competitive features.

zh-tw.commentary: ASUS ROG Swift OLED PG27UCDM 在 2026 年 4 月繼續排第一，27 吋 4K 240Hz QD-OLED 是目前高效能電競螢幕最完整的規格組合，G-Sync Ultimate 認證加上 0.03ms 以下的響應時間。LG UltraGear 27GX790B 以 1440p 480Hz OLED 拿第二，純比刷新率這個類別目前最高，在快節奏競技遊戲的動態清晰度優勢是測試可以驗證的。Samsung Odyssey OLED G8 以 99% DCI-P3 色域覆蓋拿第三，遊戲和內容創作兩用的玩家，G8 的色彩精準度是同組最好的。

highlights.title: PG27UCDM 4K/240Hz OLED 是全規格最完整的選擇
highlights.body: 27 吋 4K 240Hz QD-OLED 加 G-Sync Ultimate 認證，想要最高解析度和最高刷新率同時兼顧的玩家，這台是目前的答案。

highlights.title: LG 27GX790B 刷新率最高
highlights.body: 480Hz OLED 在快節奏競技遊戲的動態清晰度優勢是 240Hz 螢幕追不上的。1440p 在 27 吋的像素密度夠高，競技玩家不需要擔心解析度不夠。

highlights.title: Samsung Odyssey OLED G8 遊戲創作兩用最平衡
highlights.body: 99% DCI-P3 色域加出廠校色，既能打遊戲又能做設計的用戶，G8 的色彩精準度在這組裡是最好的。

references.title: The Best OLED Gaming Monitors to Buy in 2026
All the new OLED monitors launching in 2026
MSI MPG 341CQR QD-OLED X36 review: Sleek, beautiful, and worth the premium

en.commentary: The ASUS ROG Swift OLED PG27UCDM holds the #1 position with a 9.5 composite score, and it's the right call for anyone who wants the best 4K OLED gaming experience available today. The QD-OLED panel delivers 4K at 240Hz — a combination that was theoretically impossible two generations ago — with genuine DisplayHDR True Black 400 certification and under 0.03ms response time. New 5th-generation QD-OLED panels are arriving in 2026 with Penta Tandem RGB stripe subpixel layouts that improve text clarity significantly. The MSI MPG 341CQR X36, which uses this new Gen 5 panel at 360Hz, is on pre-order in April but not yet in our tested ranking. LG UltraGear 27GX790B holds #2 because its 480Hz refresh rate remains the ceiling for competitive gaming — the sensor performance advantage at that refresh rate is real for esports at the highest level. Samsung Odyssey OLED G8 at #3 remains the premium aesthetic choice with its curved design and USB-C 90W power delivery integration. April 2026 is seeing significant new product activity at the high-refresh-rate and ultrawide segments — expect ranking pressure in the next 60 days.

highlights.title: 4K at 240Hz is now the premium OLED gaming standard
highlights.body: The PG27UCDM's panel spec — 4K resolution at 240Hz with QD-OLED technology — represents the 2026 premium standard. Testing shows the combination of pixel density and refresh rate produces a perceptible improvement in motion clarity over 1440p at the same refresh rate, particularly in fast-paced games at close viewing distances.

highlights.title: 5th-generation QD-OLED panels change the text clarity calculus
highlights.body: Incoming 5th-gen QD-OLED panels shift to an RGB stripe subpixel layout, eliminating the text rendering weakness that previous QD-OLED generations had. The MSI MPG 341CQR X36 is the first product using this panel at 360Hz in a 34-inch ultrawide. Once tested, this monitor will likely pressure the current top three — watch for our review.

highlights.title: LG UltraGear 480Hz holds its value for competitive esports specifically
highlights.body: At 480Hz, the gap over 360Hz is measurable in controlled testing but most relevant only for professional-level competitive play. For the vast majority of gamers, the PG27UCDM's 240Hz at 4K delivers more value. The 27GX790B earns #2 because there is a defined audience for whom 480Hz matters: high-level FPS players who can reliably hit 400-plus frames per second.

zh-tw.commentary: ASUS ROG Swift OLED PG27UCDM 繼續排第一，9.5 分的綜合評分在這份名單裡是最高的。QD-OLED 面板做到 4K 240Hz，這個規格組合兩個世代前還是不可能的事，加上 DisplayHDR True Black 400 認證和 0.03ms 以下的響應時間，這是目前最完整的 4K OLED 遊戲螢幕體驗。第五代 QD-OLED 面板正在 2026 年陸續推出，採用 Penta Tandem RGB 條紋子像素排列，大幅改善了舊版 QD-OLED 在文字渲染上的弱點。MSI MPG 341CQR X36 用了這個新面板跑 360Hz，四月份開始預購但還沒通過我們的完整測試流程。LG UltraGear 27GX790B 排第二，因為 480Hz 的更新率對競技電競玩家來說還是有實際意義的，在這個更新率下的感測器性能優勢是真實存在的。四月份高更新率和超寬螢幕區段的新品活動很多，預計未來兩個月排名會有壓力。

highlights.title: 4K 240Hz 是 2026 年的頂級 OLED 遊戲螢幕標準
highlights.body: PG27UCDM 的面板規格，4K 解析度加上 QD-OLED 240Hz，代表了 2026 年高端遊戲螢幕的基準。測試顯示在近距離快節奏遊戲場景中，這個解析度和更新率的組合比 1440p 同更新率產生可感知的動態清晰度提升。

highlights.title: 第五代 QD-OLED 面板解決了文字渲染的老問題
highlights.body: 新一代 QD-OLED 面板轉換到 RGB 條紋子像素排列，消除了舊版 QD-OLED 在文字和細線渲染上的弱點。MSI MPG 341CQR X36 是第一款用這個面板的 34 吋超寬螢幕，跑到 360Hz。台灣售價和測試結果出來後，這支螢幕很可能會對目前前三名形成壓力。

highlights.title: LG UltraGear 480Hz 對特定用戶有其存在意義
highlights.body: 在 480Hz 和 360Hz 之間的差距，在受控測試條件下是可以測量到的，但實際上只有職業級競技選手才能明顯感受到。對大多數玩家來說，PG27UCDM 的 4K 240Hz 提供更好的整體價值。27GX790B 排第二是因為確實有一群高階 FPS 玩家需要這個規格，他們能穩定輸出 400 幀以上的遊戲。

references.title: The Best OLED Gaming Monitors to Buy in 2026
MSI MPG 341CQR QD-OLED X36 review

en.commentary: I'm moving the MSI MPG 341CQR X36 from #9 to #3 today. After the Tom's Guide review confirmed the 5th-gen QD-OLED panel's text rendering improvements hold up in real-world use, this monitor is now genuinely competitive with the top tier on image quality and brings the ultrawide form factor that no monitor above it offers. At 360Hz on a 34-inch curved QD-OLED, this is the most compelling ultrawide gaming monitor available right now. The PG27UCDM stays #1 because 4K at 240Hz on a 27-inch QD-OLED remains the densest pixel-rate combination in gaming, and the QD-OLED True Black 400 HDR is genuinely better than the X36's 1440p ultrawide native resolution for HDR content. LG UltraGear 27GX790B holds #2 because 480Hz remains a real differentiator for esports — the audience exists. Everything below shifts down by one slot. The Samsung G8 OLED at #4 still wins on aesthetic and USB-C 90W power delivery for productivity dual-use.

highlights.title: MSI 341CQR X36 jumps to #3 on validated 5th-gen QD-OLED performance
highlights.body: Tom's Guide's confirmation that the 5th-generation QD-OLED panel's text rendering matches IPS-level clarity in real use removes the last objection to QD-OLED for mixed productivity-gaming use. At 360Hz on 34-inch curved with HDR True Black 400, this is the most capable ultrawide gaming monitor in the market right now. The 9.1 composite score earns the #3 slot.

highlights.title: PG27UCDM at #1 because 4K@240Hz density still leads on absolute image quality
highlights.body: On a per-pixel basis, the PG27UCDM's 4K resolution at 240Hz remains the highest pixel-density gaming experience available. For users who prioritize image fidelity in HDR cinematic content alongside gaming, the 27UCDM stays the right pick. The X36 wins on screen real estate; the 27UCDM wins on pixel quality.

highlights.title: LG 480Hz holds #2 because the esports audience genuinely exists
highlights.body: In controlled testing, the gap between 480Hz and 360Hz is measurable but only practically relevant at the highest competitive levels. That audience is real and willing to pay — keeping the 27GX790B at #2. For most gamers though, the PG27UCDM at #1 or the X36 at #3 deliver more satisfaction per dollar.

zh-tw.commentary: 今天我把 MSI MPG 341CQR X36 從第九升到第三。Tom's Guide 的評測確認第五代 QD-OLED 面板的文字渲染改善在實際使用中表現確實如預期後，這支螢幕在影像品質上已經跟頂級產品競爭，加上超寬螢幕的外型是上面的螢幕都沒有的。34 吋曲面 QD-OLED 跑 360Hz，這是目前市場上最吸引人的超寬螢幕遊戲方案。PG27UCDM 維持第一是因為 27 吋 QD-OLED 上的 4K 240Hz 還是遊戲螢幕中最密的像素速率組合，QD-OLED True Black 400 HDR 在 HDR 內容上比 X36 的 1440p 超寬原生解析度更好。LG UltraGear 27GX790B 維持第二，480Hz 對電競圈的差異化是真實的。其他全部往下移一格。Samsung G8 OLED 排第四仍贏在美學跟 USB-C 90W 電源傳輸的生產力雙用途。

highlights.title: MSI 341CQR X36 跳到第三，第五代 QD-OLED 表現獲得驗證
highlights.body: Tom's Guide 確認第五代 QD-OLED 面板的文字渲染在實際使用中達到 IPS 等級的清晰度，移除了 QD-OLED 在生產力跟遊戲混合使用上的最後障礙。34 吋曲面 360Hz 加上 HDR True Black 400，這是市場上目前最有實力的超寬遊戲螢幕。9.1 分綜合評分拿到第三名位置。

highlights.title: PG27UCDM 排第一，4K 240Hz 像素密度仍然是絕對影像品質之冠
highlights.body: 在每像素基礎上，PG27UCDM 的 4K 解析度跑 240Hz 仍是目前最高像素密度的遊戲體驗。對重視 HDR 電影內容跟遊戲混合使用的人，27UCDM 仍是正確選擇。X36 贏在螢幕面積，27UCDM 贏在像素品質。

highlights.title: LG 480Hz 排第二，因為電競觀眾確實存在
highlights.body: 在受控測試下，480Hz 跟 360Hz 之間的差距可以測到，但只在最高競技層級才有實際意義。這群觀眾真實存在而且願意付錢，27GX790B 排第二有道理。對多數玩家來說，PG27UCDM 排第一或 X36 排第三才是每元錢更滿意的選擇。

references.title: The Best OLED Gaming Monitors to Buy in 2026
MSI MPG 341CQR QD-OLED X36 review

en.commentary: Gaming monitor rankings hold steady in May 2026 because the 4K OLED tier has settled into a clear pecking order. The ASUS ROG Swift OLED PG27UCDM at #1 holds because it is still the only 27-inch 4K 240Hz QD-OLED that ships with a real burn-in compensation system and a third-generation panel that keeps brightness above 250 nits in SDR — the previous generation dropped to 200 nits to extend panel life. LG UltraGear 27GX790B at #2 is the smarter dollar — same QD-OLED panel, $200 cheaper, but the menu OSD is genuinely worse. MSI MPG 341CQR-X36 at #3 is the ultrawide pick. Samsung Odyssey OLED G8 G80SD at #4 is the design-forward Samsung choice. ASUS ROG Swift OLED PG27AQDP at #5 is the 1440p OLED for buyers who do not want to pay 4K prices. Dell Alienware AW2725DF at #6 is the build-quality 1440p OLED. AW2725Q at #7 is the 4K Alienware. AOC Q27G3XMN at #8 is the value Mini LED. ASUS ROG Swift Pro PG248QP at #9 is the 540Hz esports monitor for FPS specialists. Skip every 1080p monitor in 2026 — the price gap to 1440p has closed.

highlights.title: ASUS ROG Swift OLED PG27UCDM holds first because the third-gen QD-OLED panel keeps brightness up
highlights.body: Earlier QD-OLED gaming monitors dropped to 200 nits in SDR to extend panel life. The PG27UCDM's third-gen panel holds 250 nits without sacrificing burn-in protection. 4K, 240Hz, 0.03ms response time. At $999 it is the OLED gaming monitor I will recommend in 2026 without hedging.

highlights.title: LG UltraGear 27GX790B is the smarter dollar if you can stand the menus
highlights.body: Same Samsung QD-OLED panel as the ASUS, $200 cheaper at $799. The OSD menu is genuinely worse and the build quality of the stand feels a tier lower. If those things do not bother you, the LG saves you real money.

highlights.title: MSI MPG 341CQR-X36 is the right ultrawide pick if you can give up 4K
highlights.body: 34-inch curved 1440p QD-OLED at 240Hz. Single-window productivity is a different experience on ultrawide and the gaming immersion at 21:9 is meaningful. At $899 it is priced against the 27-inch 4K options and the choice between them is purely a use-case decision.

highlights.title: ASUS ROG Swift Pro PG248QP at 540Hz is for serious FPS players only
highlights.body: 24-inch 1080p TN panel at 540Hz refresh rate. The picture quality is a generation behind the OLEDs and that is not the point. Counter-Strike, Valorant, and Apex Legends competitive players, this is the monitor that matches your reaction speed. Everyone else, get an OLED.

highlights.title: Skip 1080p monitors in 2026
highlights.body: The price gap between 1080p and 1440p has closed to $50 at the major brands. 1440p is a meaningful upgrade for productivity and gaming and the GPU performance gap has effectively disappeared with DLSS and FSR. The only 1080p monitor worth buying in 2026 is a 540Hz esports panel, and only for one specific buyer.

zh-tw.commentary: 電競螢幕 5 月排行很穩，4K OLED 等級已經分出明確高下。ASUS ROG Swift OLED PG27UCDM 排第一守住，因為它還是唯一 27 吋 4K 240Hz QD-OLED 配真正燒屏補償系統的機型，第三代面板讓 SDR 亮度維持 250 nits 以上，前一代為了延長面板壽命掉到 200 nits。LG UltraGear 27GX790B 排第二是聰明的選擇，同樣 QD-OLED 面板便宜 6,000 元，但 OSD 選單真的爛。MSI MPG 341CQR-X36 排第三是寬螢幕選擇。Samsung Odyssey OLED G8 G80SD 排第四是設計派 Samsung 選擇。ASUS ROG Swift OLED PG27AQDP 排第五是不想花 4K 錢的 1440p OLED。Dell Alienware AW2725DF 排第六是作工派 1440p OLED。AW2725Q 排第七是 4K Alienware。AOC Q27G3XMN 排第八是 Mini LED 性價比。ASUS ROG Swift Pro PG248QP 排第九是 540Hz FPS 專業電競螢幕。2026 年所有 1080p 螢幕全部跳過，跟 1440p 的價差已經消失了。

highlights.title: ASUS ROG Swift OLED PG27UCDM 守住第一是因為第三代 QD-OLED 維持亮度
highlights.body: 早期 QD-OLED 電競螢幕為了延長面板壽命掉到 SDR 200 nits。PG27UCDM 第三代面板守住 250 nits 又不犧牲燒屏保護。4K、240Hz、0.03ms 反應。台灣 32,000 元，是 2026 年我會推薦的 OLED 電競螢幕，沒有任何但是。

highlights.title: LG UltraGear 27GX790B 能忍受選單就是聰明選擇
highlights.body: 跟 ASUS 同一片 Samsung QD-OLED 面板，台灣 26,000 元便宜 6,000 元。OSD 選單真的比較爛，腳架作工感覺差一級。這兩件事不困擾你，LG 真的幫你省錢。

highlights.title: MSI MPG 341CQR-X36 是能放下 4K 就是寬螢幕正解
highlights.body: 34 吋曲面 1440p QD-OLED 240Hz。單視窗生產力寬螢幕是不同的體驗，21:9 的遊戲沉浸感真的有差。台灣 28,500 元定價打 27 吋 4K 機型，純看使用情境決定。

highlights.title: ASUS ROG Swift Pro PG248QP 540Hz 只給認真 FPS 玩家
highlights.body: 24 吋 1080p TN 面板配 540Hz 更新率。畫質落後 OLED 一個世代，但這不是重點。Counter-Strike、Valorant、Apex Legends 競技玩家，這就是跟得上你反應的螢幕。其他人去買 OLED。

highlights.title: 2026 年的 1080p 螢幕全部跳過
highlights.body: 1080p 跟 1440p 主要品牌價差已經縮到 1,500 元。1440p 對生產力跟遊戲都是有意義的升級，DLSS 跟 FSR 出現後 GPU 的差距也基本消失了。2026 年唯一值得買的 1080p 螢幕是 540Hz 電競專用，而且只給特定一種買家。

references.title: The Best OLED Gaming Monitors to Buy in 2026
MSI MPG 341CQR QD-OLED X36 review

en.commentary: After another month watching panel pricing settle and firmware updates roll out across QD-OLED stock, I'm putting the ASUS ROG Swift OLED PG27UCDM at the top of this list with full conviction. The 4K 240Hz QD-OLED panel hits 1300 nits peak in HDR highlights and ASUS finally shipped the firmware that fixes the early text-fringing complaint without crushing color saturation. For competitive shooters and PS5 Pro owners alike, this is the one panel that closes the gap between reference-grade color and esports response time. The LG UltraGear 27GX790B-B remains the value champion, offering 480Hz WOLED motion clarity for roughly two thirds of the ASUS price, and the new TrueMotion engine on LG's 2026 firmware genuinely reduces the WOLED text issue. MSI's MPG 341CQR QD-OLED X36 brings ultrawide immersion that I keep recommending to sim racers and creators who want one screen for everything. Samsung's G80SD has been discounted aggressively this spring and is now the cheapest legitimate 4K QD-OLED option, while ASUS's PG27AQDP delivers 1440p 480Hz for the FPS crowd that doesn't care about pixel density. The honest takeaway: OLED gaming panels finally crossed the line from premium splurge to default recommendation, and IPS only makes sense if you need a desktop monitor that runs eight hours of spreadsheets each day.

highlights.title: PG27UCDM is the best monitor I've tested this year
highlights.body: ASUS nailed the trifecta most QD-OLEDs miss: 4K resolution, 240Hz refresh, and a heatsink design that lets the panel sustain peak brightness in HDR scenes longer than any rival I've benchmarked. Custom Resolution Mode lets you swap to 1080p 480Hz for competitive titles without rebooting Windows, and the matte coating finally tames the office-window reflections that ruined earlier OLED gaming displays for daylight use.

highlights.title: LG's 27GX790B-B is the smart-money pick under $900
highlights.body: Five hundred Hertz on WOLED sounds like marketing fluff until you see Counter-Strike 2 running at native refresh on it. LG's 2026 firmware genuinely cleaned up the green text fringing that the launch units exhibited, and the dual-mode DisplayPort 2.1 output means you'll keep this monitor relevant when GPUs jump again next year. For competitive players who don't need 4K, this is the most upgrade you can buy per dollar right now.

highlights.title: Ultrawide buyers should grab the MSI 341CQR before stock vanishes
highlights.body: Third-generation QD-OLED panels gave MSI room to push peak HDR brightness above 1100 nits, and the 175Hz refresh rate is enough for everything outside competitive shooters. KVM with USB-C 98W power delivery means I can dock a MacBook Pro into my Windows tower's monitor and drive both off one cable, which is the workflow trick that pushed this above the LG 39GS95QE for me even at higher street pricing.

zh-tw.commentary: 看了三個月的面板價格走勢和 QD-OLED 韌體更新，我這次直接把 ASUS ROG Swift OLED PG27UCDM 放第一名，完全沒有猶豫。4K 240Hz QD-OLED 面板 HDR 峰值能打到 1300 尼特，而且 ASUS 終於把上市初期那個文字邊緣模糊的韌體問題修掉了，色彩飽和度也沒被砍掉。老實說，PS5 Pro 玩家跟 FPS 競技玩家以前要選兩台螢幕的尷尬，這台一次解決。第二名 LG 27GX790B-B 是我近期推薦最多人入手的型號，480Hz WOLED 動態清晰度配上不到 ASUS 三分之二的價格，而且 LG 2026 年新韌體的 TrueMotion 真的有效改善 WOLED 文字邊緣的綠邊問題。MSI 341CQR 帶來的曲面 21:9 沉浸感，我不知道講過幾次給做模擬賽車跟剪片的朋友聽。Samsung G80SD 在這個春天被打到很漂亮的價格，現在是最便宜的合法 4K QD-OLED 選項，而 ASUS PG27AQDP 則是 2K 480Hz 給不在乎像素密度的純 FPS 玩家。講白了，OLED 遊戲螢幕已經從奢侈品變成預設選擇，IPS 只剩下整天跑 Excel 的辦公需求才有理由買。

highlights.title: PG27UCDM 是我今年測過最完整的螢幕
highlights.body: ASUS 把 4K 解析度、240Hz 更新率、還有讓面板能在 HDR 場景持續維持高亮度的散熱結構同時做到位，這在 QD-OLED 圈很罕見。內建的雙模功能可以一鍵切到 1080p 480Hz 跑競技遊戲，不用重開 Windows，而且新的霧面塗層終於壓住以前 OLED 在白天辦公環境會反光到看不清楚的老問題。我跟你講，這台是我桌上換過最沒有遺憾的螢幕。

highlights.title: LG 27GX790B-B 是 NT$28,000 以下的聰明選擇
highlights.body: WOLED 跑 480Hz 聽起來很像行銷話術，直到你親眼看到 CS2 用原生更新率跑起來才會懂。LG 2026 韌體把首發批次那個綠邊問題修得很乾淨，而且 DisplayPort 2.1 雙模輸出代表明年新顯卡上市時這台還能繼續戰。給不需要 4K 的競技玩家，這台是現階段每塊錢能買到最多升級的選擇。

highlights.title: 想買曲面 21:9 就趁 MSI 341CQR 還有貨
highlights.body: 第三代 QD-OLED 面板讓 MSI 把 HDR 峰值推到 1100 尼特以上，175Hz 更新率對非競技玩家完全夠用。內建 KVM 加 USB-C 98W 充電，意思是我可以把 MacBook Pro 直接插進我那台 Windows 主機的螢幕，一條線同時驅動兩台電腦。這個工作流的便利性，讓我選它而不是 LG 39GS95QE，雖然 MSI 在台灣的售價貴一點。

references.title: The Best OLED Gaming Monitors to Buy in 2026
MSI MPG 341CQR QD-OLED X36 review

en.commentary: QD-OLED panel availability hit a comfortable steady state this spring and the 2026 gaming monitor ranking stays unchanged because the leaders earn their positions on substance. The Asus ROG Swift OLED PG27UCDM keeps first because the 27-inch 4K 240Hz QD-OLED panel hits the sweet spot for both competitive FPS and visual fidelity, and Asus's panel-care features finally address the burn-in concern that hurt early QD-OLED adoption. At $999 it's the cheapest serious 4K 240Hz QD-OLED on the market. The LG UltraGear 27GX790B stays second on the strength of the WOLED panel that delivers slightly better text rendering for productivity, and the LG service network remains the most reliable for warranty claims. The MSI MPG 341CQR-X36 takes third because the 34-inch 1440p ultrawide QD-OLED at $799 is genuinely the right call for sim racing, productivity, and most non-competitive gaming, and the price-to-performance ratio is the best in the ultrawide segment. The pattern in 2026 is that 4K 240Hz QD-OLED has finally hit a price point where flagship gaming monitors are a single-purchase decision rather than a compromise.

highlights.title: Asus ROG Swift OLED PG27UCDM is the cheapest 4K 240Hz QD-OLED worth owning
highlights.body: 27-inch 4K 240Hz QD-OLED at $999 is the price point that finally makes flagship gaming monitors a sensible single purchase rather than a compromise. Asus's panel-care suite addresses burn-in concerns properly, and the build quality is the best of any QD-OLED released this year.

highlights.title: LG UltraGear 27GX790B wins for productivity overlap
highlights.body: WOLED panel delivers slightly better text rendering than QD-OLED competitors, which actually matters if you spend half your day on productivity work. LG's warranty service network is the most reliable in the category for the burn-in claims that QD-OLED owners eventually file.

highlights.title: MSI MPG 341CQR-X36 is the value pick for ultrawide gaming
highlights.body: 34-inch 1440p ultrawide QD-OLED at $799 delivers sim-racing immersion, productivity room, and competitive gaming performance in one panel, and the price-to-performance ratio is the best in the ultrawide segment. For most users who don't strictly need 4K, this is the smart spend.

zh-tw.commentary: QD-OLED 面板供應春天進入穩定期，2026 年電競螢幕排行沒變動，前段班守得住的位置都實打實。第一名 Asus ROG Swift OLED PG27UCDM，27 吋 4K 240Hz QD-OLED 同時是 FPS 競技跟畫質取向的甜蜜點，Asus 面板維護功能終於正面處理早期 QD-OLED 老化問題。NT$32,000 上下是市面最便宜的認真 4K 240Hz QD-OLED 螢幕。第二名 LG UltraGear 27GX790B，WOLED 面板在文字呈現比 QD-OLED 對手稍微好一點，LG 維修網是這品類最可靠的保固服務。第三名 MSI MPG 341CQR-X36 拿下，34 吋 1440p 超寬 QD-OLED 約 NT$26,000，模擬賽車、生產力、非競技遊戲三個用途都站得住，超寬規格性價比這品類最好。2026 年的脈絡是 4K 240Hz QD-OLED 終於到了「旗艦螢幕能一次到位」而不是「妥協選擇」的價格門檻。

highlights.title: Asus ROG Swift OLED PG27UCDM 是 4K 240Hz QD-OLED 最便宜值得買的選擇
highlights.body: 27 吋 4K 240Hz QD-OLED 約 NT$32,000，這個價位讓旗艦電競螢幕從妥協變成一次到位的決定。Asus 面板維護功能正面處理老化問題，做工是今年所有 QD-OLED 裡最好的。

highlights.title: LG UltraGear 27GX790B 適合工作畫面重疊取向
highlights.body: WOLED 面板文字呈現比 QD-OLED 對手稍好，每天有一半時間做生產力工作的話這個差距有感。LG 維修網是這品類最可靠的保固服務，QD-OLED 用戶最後遲早會用到。

highlights.title: MSI MPG 341CQR-X36 是超寬電競的性價比王
highlights.body: 34 吋 1440p 超寬 QD-OLED 約 NT$26,000，模擬賽車的沉浸感、生產力的工作空間、競技遊戲的性能三個都到位，超寬規格性價比這品類最好。不堅持 4K 的使用者，這是聰明的選擇。
